_method: RECON source->sink flow cube (Zenodo 14191920), cross-checked by the AMSSRAB 3-model ensemble (WAM2layers + UTrack + WaterSip; Zenodo 17032120): all three put Amazon->La Plata at 16-20%, inside Zemp. confidence='medium-high'.
_note: Per-cell moisture flow (m3/yr) from the source box; the hero field. Colour = relative contribution from the Amazonas source.
